CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-06-2014 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-09-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Miles Lendway, CSR#13684.

Andrew Steinfeold, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, SYNNEX TECHNOLOGY, INC.,
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) MIDWEST MEDIA GROUP, INC., an Illinois corporation.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $83,909.09
Pre-Judgment Interest: $12,538.09
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $456.51
Total Judgment in the amount of $96,903.69
Judgment signed in open court.
